theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

narrative.summary: Akash: 정량 종합 57점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 64 / 중기 68 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 3개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 50MA, Swing High, 라운드 $0.60. 현재가 대비 +33.1% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $0.6008 아래 손절가 $0.5348 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Oil Steadies as US Sees Progress in Iran Deal Despite Tensions
top_news.summary: Oil was little changed in early Asian trading, as the US touted progress toward a peace deal with Iran despite fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: First Brands Hit With US Claim for Alleged Tariffs Fraud
top_news.summary: The US government has joined the line of creditors impacted by alleged fraud at bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands, in this instance for accusations the company cheated on how much it should have paid on tariffs.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks Set to Rise as Iran Deal Hopes Hold: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian stocks were set to edge higher Wednesday in a sign traders are clinging to expectations the US and Iran will sign a peace deal even as military strikes in the Persian Gulf persisted.

top_news.title: Short Seller Left Tells Jury No Law Barred Post-Research Trades
top_news.summary: Short seller Andrew Left told jurors at his criminal securities fraud trial that he doesn’t believe there is anything wrong with him profiting from the “price correction” of a stock after he issues a report or tweet about a company he thinks is overvalued or undervalued.

top_news.title: Kardigan Files for IPO to Fund Cardiovascular Disease Treatment
top_news.summary: Kardigan Inc. filed for a US initial public offering that will help fund three late-stage drugs that target the root cause of cardiovascular diseases.

top_news.title: Rocket, Satellite Stocks Surge as SpaceX IPO Fuels Euphoria
top_news.summary: Space and satellite-related stocks soared Tuesday as investor enthusiasm around the industry intensified.

top_news.title: Emerging Currencies Slide as Iran War ‘Confusion’ Jolts Markets
top_news.summary: Most emerging-market currencies weakened on Tuesday as overnight clashes near the Strait of Hormuz offset signs of progress toward a US-Iran peace deal, even as developing-nation stocks rose on optimism around artificial intelligence.

top_news.title: US Steel Costs Impacted by War, Trade Deals
top_news.summary: Sam McKinney, KeyBanc Capital Markets vice president and equity research analyst, said that while US steel mills have mostly hedged rising electricity costs with long term contracts, they are impacted by increasing diesel prices to ship steel by truck and rail route. On the other side of the coin, steel hasn't seen a drop in value in in the face of the war, as investors look to steel stocks to hedge against inflation.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: MSG Sports Shares Rally to Record as Knicks Reach NBA Finals
top_news.summary: Madison Square Garden Sports Corp. hit a fresh record on Tuesday, lifted by investor enthusiasm after the New York Knicks clinched their first NBA Finals berth in nearly three decades.

top_news.title: Jefferies Says Investors Boost ‘Nuclear Exposure’: ESG Investing
top_news.summary: Almost two-thirds of fund managers permit some level of “nuclear exposure,” with 34% allowing investments in nuclear weaponry, according to Jefferies Financial Group Inc.’s fourth-annual ESG and defense survey.
